title: Bunkmate Requests
excerpt: Space is provided on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire for you to list your child’s bunkmate request. Such requests will generally be honored if both families make the same request, unless there is a significant disparity in ages or grades. Some campers request to be bunked with several other children. Because of various cabin sizes, CBM […]
contentHtml: Space is provided on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire for you to list your child’s bunkmate request. Such requests will generally be honored if both families make the same request, unless there is a significant disparity in ages or grades. Some campers request to be bunked with several other children. Because of various cabin sizes, CBM can only commit to facilitating one request per camper. We try to honor old friendships, encourage new ones, and create a cabin group that will enable a fabulous experience for each child.
contentText:
Space is provided on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire for you to list your child’s bunkmate request. Such requests will generally be honored if 
both families make the same request,
 unless there is a significant disparity in ages or grades. Some campers request to be bunked with several other children. Because of various cabin sizes, CBM can only commit to facilitating one request per camper. We try to honor old friendships, encourage new ones, and create a cabin group that will enable a fabulous experience for each child.
